<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#React Native 基础|React Native 基础]]
    - [[#React Native 基础#[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/getting-started.html=content|安装]]|[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/getting-started.html=content|安装]]]]
    - [[#React Native 基础#创建项目|创建项目]]
    - [[#React Native 基础#启动调试|启动调试]]
      - [[#React Native 基础#启动调试#[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/running-on-device-android.html=content|真机调试]]|[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/running-on-device-android.html=content|真机调试]]]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
=React Native 基础=
==[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/getting-started.html=content|安装]]==
需要安装的包
+ `npm install -g yarn`
+ `npm install -g react-native-cli`
+ Android Studio 2+

设置yarn
{{{bash
yarn config set registry https://registry.npm.taobao.org --global
yarn config set disturl https://npm.taobao.org/dist --global
}}}
Android Studio需要安装：
+ Android SDK
+ Android SDK Platfrom
+ Android Virtual Device
+ Android 6.0 (Marshmallow)
  + Google APIs
  + Android SDK Platform 23
  + Intel x86 Atom System Image
  + Intel x86 Atom_64 System Image
  + Google APIs Intel x86 Atom_64 System Image。
+ Android SDK Build Tools
  + Android SDK Build-Tools 23.0.1（必须是这个版本）
  + Android Support Repository (最底部)

ANDROID_HOME环境变量
{{{bash
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Android/Sdk
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools
}}}
==创建项目==
{{{bash
react-native init AwesomeProject
cd AwesomeProject
react-native run-android
}}}
==启动调试==
虚拟机启动未成功，电脑不支持KVM

===[[http://reactnative.cn/docs/0.47/running-on-device-android.html=content|真机调试]]===
+ 连接设备 `adb devices`
+ 运行调试 `react-native run-android`
+ 配置在线调试 `adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081`
+ 在真机上设置端口 `Dev Settings\Debug server host for device\000.000.000.000:8081`
+ 重新加载代码:设备菜单->ReloadJS

查看日志
{{{bash
adb logcat *:S ReactNative:V ReactNativeJS:V
}}}
